meanings.definition: lacking in magnanimity; - Times Litt. Sup.
examples: it seems ungenerous to end this review of a splendid work of scholarship on a critical note
a meanspirited man unwilling to forgive

meanings.definition: having or showing an ignoble lack of honor or morality; - Edmund Burke; ; - Shakespeare
examples: that liberal obedience without which your army would be a base rabble
chok'd with ambition of the meaner sort
something essentially vulgar and meanspirited in politics
